intent: 2-STOREY 2BR / 2 bath side-spine-stair with the GF HALL retained — 8x12 lot, no carport. 4x8 envelope per floor = 32 m², comfortably above the 28 m² compact-fallback threshold, so the hall variant runs as-is (no auto-switch): great room front, hall + stair spine mid-left, T&B and kitchen rear.
